criteria.label: Connection and respect
criteria.description: Acknowledges RM performance and builds trust before redirecting.

criteria.label: Diagnosis and clarity
criteria.description: Clearly identifies gaps in routines or alignment with evidence.

criteria.label: Coaching structure (SBI or RUSH)
criteria.description: Uses a structured coaching approach aligned to the persona's needs.

criteria.label: Branch alignment focus
criteria.description: Highlights the importance of LG and branch stakeholder involvement.

criteria.label: Commitment and next steps
criteria.description: Secures clear commitments, timelines, or routines for follow-up.
